rules.name: Stealth - Protect Gateway
rules.comments: Drop all traffic to the gateway itself from internal networks

rules.name: Anti-Spoofing
rules.comments: Drop traffic from external networks that claim internal source IPs

rules.name: Allow DNS Queries
rules.comments: Allow DNS resolution from internal hosts

rules.name: Allow HTTP/HTTPS to Web Server
rules.comments: Allow inbound web traffic to public web server in DMZ

rules.name: Allow HTTPS to App Server
rules.comments: Allow web server to communicate with application server

rules.name: Allow App to Database
rules.comments: Allow application server to query database server

rules.name: Allow SSH Administration
rules.comments: Allow SSH access to servers from admin network during business hours

rules.name: Internal Outbound Web Access
rules.comments: Allow internal users outbound web access with content filtering

rules.name: Allow ICMP Monitoring
rules.comments: Allow monitoring probes to internal and DMZ networks

rules.name: Allow Admin and Monitoring to Management Console
rules.comments: Allow admin and monitoring networks to access management console

rules.name: Allow Legacy FTP to Web Server (DEPRECATED)
rules.comments: Deprecated FTP access - disabled for security reasons

rules.name: Allow All Internal Networks Outbound HTTPS
rules.comments: Allow all internal subnets (corp, DMZ, admin, monitoring) outbound HTTPS

rules.name: Allow Internal to Corporate Email and Database
rules.comments: Allow internal users to access email and database servers during business hours

rules.name: Allow VPN Pool to Internal Resources
rules.comments: Allow VPN users and admins to access internal and DMZ resources

rules.name: Cleanup Rule - Drop All
rules.comments: Implicit drop rule - all unmatched traffic is dropped and logged

rules.name: Block Social Media
rules.comments: Block social media sites during business hours for internal network

rules.name: Allow All Other Web
rules.comments: Allow all non-blocked web traffic

rules.name: Block Known Malicious IPs
rules.comments: Drop traffic from known malicious IP addresses

rules.name: Block High-Risk Threats
rules.comments: Block all critical and high severity threat signatures

rules.name: Block Peer-to-Peer
rules.comments: Block peer-to-peer file sharing applications

rules.name: Allow Business Applications
rules.comments: Allow essential business applications

rules.name: Block All Other Applications
rules.comments: Catch-all to block unapproved applications

rules.name: Allow Legacy Chat Application (DEPRECATED)
rules.comments: Legacy chat apps - disabled, replaced by Slack

rules.name: Allow HTTP/HTTPS to DMZ Web Server
rules.comments: Permit inbound web traffic to DMZ web server

rules.name: Allow Web to App Server SQL Query
rules.comments: Allow web server to query application server and databases

rules.name: Allow DNS from DMZ to External
rules.comments: Allow DMZ hosts to resolve external DNS

rules.name: Allow DMZ to Internal on Business Services
rules.comments: Allow DMZ to internal network for business services during business hours

rules.name: Block DMZ to Internal Everything Else
rules.comments: Block all other DMZ-to-internal traffic with alert

rules.name: Bypass Internal CA Sites
rules.comments: Bypass inspection for internal sites using internal CA

rules.name: Bypass Health & Financial Sites
rules.comments: Bypass HTTPS inspection for regulated industries due to legal constraints

rules.name: Inspect All External HTTPS
rules.comments: Inspect all outbound HTTPS traffic using internal CA

rules.name: Block High-Risk Categories
rules.comments: Drop HTTPS access to high-risk site categories

rules.name: Inspect Admin Traffic
rules.comments: Inspect admin HTTPS traffic with alerting enabled

rules.name: Bypass Certificate Pinning Sites (DEPRECATED)
rules.comments: Deprecated - certificate pinning issues resolved in newer clients

rules.name: Hide Internal Network Behind Gateway
rules.comments: Masquerade internal traffic to internet using gateway external IP

rules.name: Static NAT Web Server
rules.comments: Static 1:1 NAT for public web server to internal DMZ address

rules.name: Port Forward SMTP to Mail Server
rules.comments: Port forward SMTP traffic from public IP to internal mail server

rules.name: NAT VPN Pool to Internal
rules.comments: Allow VPN users direct access to internal resources without translation

rules.name: Static NAT Legacy FTP Server (DEPRECATED)
rules.comments: Deprecated FTP NAT rule - disabled for security

hosts.name: FTP_Server_Public
hosts.comments: Public-facing IP for legacy FTP server (NAT, deprecated)

users.name: Guest_Users
users.comments: Guest network users with restricted access

certificates.name: Internal_CA
certificates.comments: Internal Certificate Authority for HTTPS inspection
